API_SERVER_PORT.description: Host port for Hermes' OpenAI-compatible API + health endpoint (only used when API_SERVER_ENABLED=yes).

API_SERVER_ENABLED.description: Expose Hermes' HTTP API beyond localhost. Required so the oscar-voice gatekeeper can deliver Voice-PE pushes and external automation scripts can talk to Hermes. Set to yes for OSCAR's normal install.

API_SERVER_KEY.description: Bearer key required on the Hermes API (min 8 chars; `openssl rand -hex 32`). Only used when API_SERVER_ENABLED=yes. ServiceBay auto-generates if left blank.

DASHBOARD_PORT.description: Host port for the web dashboard (only used when HERMES_DASHBOARD=yes). Bound to 127.0.0.1 inside the container — reach it via SSH tunnel, never publish to LAN unauthenticated.

HERMES_DASHBOARD.description: Run the in-container dashboard alongside `gateway run`. The dashboard stores API keys — only enable when you reach it over SSH tunnel. Disabled by default in Phase 1.

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps and the Hermes cron scheduler.

OSCAR_REGISTRY_DIR.description: Absolute path on the host where the OSCAR repo is checked out (`scripts/install.sh` does the clone). Hermes read-mounts skills/ from here at /opt/data/skills/oscar.
